title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Jayabheri Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Jayabheri Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jayabheri Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Jayabheri Group:
Jayabheri Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jayabheri Group!
